MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion To Enter Judgment Pursuant To CCP 664.6 is granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/HK)
